steps.title: Isolate the target variable
steps.content: Add $57$ to both sides of $y-57=px$ to get $$y=px+57.$$

steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content: The form $y=px+57$ matches choice B. That matches choice B — B is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice B is correct. Adding $57$ to each side of the given equation yields $y=px+57$. Therefore, the equation $y=px+57$ correctly expresses $y$ in terms of $p$ and $x$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect and may result from conceptual errors.
